title: convolvulus hystrix subsp. hystrix
intro: Convolvulus hystrix subsp. hystrix, commonly known as the spiny bindweed, is a plant species in the Convolvulaceae family that is characterized by its spiny stems and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Convolvulus hystrix subsp. hystrix include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Convolvulus hystrix subsp. hystrix can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
